fight_director.fight_intent: colossal suppression after the hero changes the power relation

combatants.name: hero
combatants.state: wounded but stable, low stance, right hand on short sword

combatants.name: enemy
combatants.state: larger body, advancing from upper stairs, spear pressing down

fight_director.tactical_objective: pin the enemy in place by planting a suppression seal at the first weapon contact
fight_director.opponent_counter_pressure: enemy uses height advantage and spear reach to force the hero backward
fight_director.spatial_map: enemy screen left and higher on stairs, hero screen right and lower in courtyard, camera keeps the left-right axis, wet stone floor and broken pillars as anchors
action_chain: hero steps diagonally inside the spear line
short sword spine contacts the spear shaft
golden avatar shadow rises behind hero
suppression field presses enemy into half-kneel
fight_director.result_state: hero holds ground on lower right, enemy pinned left-front in half-kneel, spear displaced toward screen left, glowing field remains for next shot
fight_director.readability_plan: first show left-right layout, then clear weapon contact, then avatar scale, then enemy reaction and floor pressure

combat_beat.screen_action: hero enters under the spear line and turns the weapon clash into a ground suppression field
combat_beat.tactical_meaning: the smaller fighter stops retreating and takes control of space
combat_beat.anticipation: hero crouches low as the spear shadow crosses the wet floor
combat_beat.contact_or_collision: short sword spine visibly hits the middle of the spear shaft
combat_beat.impact_feedback: sparks and rain spray burst sideways from the weapon contact
combat_beat.reaction: enemy armor bends forward and one knee is forced down after contact
combat_beat.aftermath: floor pattern glows, debris presses flat, hero remains rooted
combat_beat.camera_logic: low three-quarter tracking push, no orbit during contact
combat_beat.vfx_logic: avatar appears behind hero only at impact, suppression field expands from contact point to enemy feet
combat_beat.continuity_out: next shot starts from enemy half-kneel inside glowing floor pattern

impact_system.pre_impact: rain quiets visually, spear shadow lengthens, hero lowers weight
impact_system.contact_frame: sword spine meets spear shaft in a clean crossed-weapon frame
impact_system.hitstop: one brief frozen-feeling impact frame before the field expands
impact_system.recoil: spear shaft vibrates left, hero sleeve snaps backward, enemy shoulder dips
impact_system.environment_feedback: wet floor ripples, golden floor lines flare, small stones press downward
impact_system.sound_hint: low boom plus metal ring, foreground only
impact_system.aftermath_pose: hero planted forward, enemy half-kneeling under pressure

vfx_power.source: hero sword contact and palm seal
vfx_power.shape_language: gold circular floor marks and translucent avatar silhouette
vfx_power.motion_behavior: field expands outward then pushes downward
vfx_power.color_temperature: warm gold against cold blue rain
vfx_power.interaction_with_body: hero silhouette stays clear, enemy armor and cloak bend downward
vfx_power.interaction_with_environment: rain spray, floor reflection, dust, and stones react downward
vfx_power.visibility_rule: VFX must support action readability, not hide contact frame
vfx_power.start_state: faint gold line at weapon contact
vfx_power.peak_state: avatar shadow rises and floor seal brightens under enemy

camera_coverage.lens_feel: wide spatial depth with foreground wet stone
camera_coverage.screen_direction: hero moves right to left, enemy pressure comes left to right
camera_coverage.subject_priority: weapon contact first, avatar scale second, enemy knee reaction third
camera_coverage.cut_point: cut after enemy is pinned and field remains readable
camera_coverage.continuity_from_previous: previous shot shows enemy advancing from upper stairs
camera_coverage.continuity_to_next: next shot can begin on enemy half-kneel or floor seal close-up

provider_route_strategy.first_frame_plan: hero low right, enemy high left with spear descending, wet courtyard visible
provider_route_strategy.end_frame_plan: enemy half-kneel inside floor seal, hero rooted forward
provider_route_strategy.prompt_compression_rule: use shot graph to write one compressed execution prompt; do not paste director analysis

key_poses: field expands from contact or floor anchor
final dominance pose holds readable spacing
action_events: power ignition starts from a visible source
combat_tempo.force_feedback: enemy body compression and floor debris/rain ripple show the force path
combat_tempo.major_traversal_window: extended duration is justified by environment reveal, power reveal, aftermath, or readable hold
combat_tempo.speed_curve: short ignition, fast expansion, pressure hitstop, heavy settling hold; front-load at least 60% of events before 70% of duration, then hold reaction or landing

prompt_canonical_en: 3D guoman cinematic rain courtyard. Hero on lower screen right steps inside the spear line, sword spine contacts the enemy spear shaft, a golden suppression field expands downward from the contact, translucent avatar silhouette appears briefly, enemy is pressed into half-kneel. Low tracking push, clear contact, wet stone reflections.
provider_execution_prompt: Rain-soaked stone courtyard at night, hero low on screen right facing left, enemy spear guardian higher on screen left thrusting down. The hero steps diagonally inside and the short sword spine clearly strikes the middle of the spear shaft. At that contact, a warm golden floor seal expands downward and a translucent avatar silhouette appears behind the hero for a brief instant. Enemy armor bends forward into a half-kneel, spear displaced left, wet floor ripples and small stones press down. Low three-quarter tracking push only, cold blue rain with warm gold reflections. No gore, no teleporting, no VFX covering the weapon contact, no extra characters, no subtitles.

asset_bindings.name: short sword and spear scale reference
hero low right enemy high left first frame

qc_expectations: suppression field does not hide action

qc_evidence.action_readability: Weapon contact, avatar reveal, enemy reaction, and aftermath are ordered visibly.
qc_evidence.tactical_clarity: Hero uses the spear clash to reverse pressure into a suppression field.
qc_evidence.contact_believability: The first contact is the sword spine striking the spear shaft at center frame.
qc_evidence.impact_feedback: Sparks, rain spray, floor ripples, and stones pressing down prove impact.
qc_evidence.spatial_continuity: Hero stays screen right/lower and enemy stays screen left/higher through the shot.
qc_evidence.vfx_readability: Gold seal expands from contact and stays below the action instead of covering it.
qc_evidence.style_consistency: 3D guoman cues use depth, wet stone, volumetric rain, and mythic scale.
qc_evidence.cutability: The shot ends with enemy half-kneeling in a stable next-shot state.
